# Segments presets

Manage user created segments presets (filters).

```bash
npm install @dynatrace-sdk/segments-presets
```


## Functions



### addRecentSegmentsPreset

<div class="padding-bottom--md">
<strong>addRecentSegmentsPreset(segments): Promise&lt;[UserSegmentsPresets](#usersegmentspresets)&gt;</strong>

<div class="padding-left--md">

Adds a new segments preset to the recently used in the current environment scope.



</div>


#### Parameters

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|segments<sup>*required</sup>|Array&lt;[FilterSegment](#filtersegment)&gt;|List of segments to create a new preset. |




#### Returns

| Return type | Description |
|---|---|
|UserSegmentsPresets|User created segments presets in the current environment.|





</div>





### getSegmentsPresets

<div class="padding-bottom--md">
<strong>getSegmentsPresets(): Promise&lt;[UserSegmentsPresets](#usersegmentspresets)&gt;</strong>

<div class="padding-left--md">

Retrieves user created segments presets.



</div>



#### Returns

| Return type | Description |
|---|---|
|UserSegmentsPresets|User created segments presets in the current environment.|





</div>





### pinSegmentsPreset

<div class="padding-bottom--md">
<strong>pinSegmentsPreset(segments): Promise&lt;[UserSegmentsPresets](#usersegmentspresets)&gt;</strong>

<div class="padding-left--md">

Pins a new segments preset in the current app scope.



</div>


#### Parameters

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|segments<sup>*required</sup>|Array&lt;[FilterSegment](#filtersegment)&gt;|List of segments to create a new preset. |




#### Returns

| Return type | Description |
|---|---|
|UserSegmentsPresets|User created segments presets in the current environment.|





</div>





### unpinSegmentsPreset

<div class="padding-bottom--md">
<strong>unpinSegmentsPreset(id): Promise&lt;[UserSegmentsPresets](#usersegmentspresets)&gt;</strong>

<div class="padding-left--md">

Unpins the segments preset in the current app scope.



</div>


#### Parameters

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|id<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)|ID of the segments preset to unpin. |




#### Returns

| Return type | Description |
|---|---|
|UserSegmentsPresets|User created segments presets in the current environment.|





</div>



## Interfaces

### FilterSegment
Configuration of a single segment.

The segment is identified by ID. The configuration may include a set of variables.


#### Properties

| Name | Type |
| --- | --- |
|id<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)| 
|variables|Array&lt;FilterSegmentVariableDefinition&gt;| 


### SegmentsPreset
Preset containing a configuration of one or more segments.

The preset is identified by ID that&apos;s not stable in the long term.
It means, consumers can&apos;t rely on it to identify presets created during previous sessions.


#### Properties

| Name | Type |
| --- | --- |
|id<sup>*required</sup>|[string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String)| 
|segments<sup>*required</sup>|Array&lt;[FilterSegment](#filtersegment)&gt;| 


### UserSegmentsPresets
Collection of user segments presets.

It contains recently used and pinned segments presets.


#### Properties

| Name | Type |
| --- | --- |
|pinnedPresets<sup>*required</sup>|Array&lt;[SegmentsPreset](#segmentspreset)&gt;| 
|recentPresets<sup>*required</sup>|Array&lt;[SegmentsPreset](#segmentspreset)&gt;|
